'''DD''' was the nickname<ref name="RC:HC" /> of a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. He was created by the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] cloners on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] for use in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="db" /> Trained as a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone]] [[Clone commando/Legends|commando]], he was made a member of [[Niner's squad]], serving alongside fellow commandos [[O-Four]] and [[Sev (Niner's squad)|Sev]] under [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] [[Niner Skirata|Niner]]. The [[Squad/Legends|squad]] was deployed to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|first battle]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. During the fight DD, O-Four and Sev were all killed, leaving Niner as the only member of the squad. The sergeant later wished he had held DD and Sev back during the battle.<ref name="RC:HC" /> Like all clone troopers, DD was 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="db" />

==Behind the scenes==
DD was first mentioned in ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' a [[2004]] novel written by [[Karen Traviss]]. He later received mention in ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'', another book in the same [[Republic Commando|series]].
